emails.subject: [FIRST_NAME], your body is giving you signals
emails.preview: What your symptoms are really telling you
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Thank you for sharing your health concerns with us, especially regarding [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM]. We know how frustrating it can be when you're struggling but your labs come back 'normal.'

Here's something most people don't realize: conventional lab ranges are designed to catch disease, not identify dysfunction. When you're experiencing [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], your body is signaling that something is out of balance—even if you haven't crossed into a disease state yet.

At Peninsula Integrative Medicine, we look deeper. We examine what your numbers actually mean for your unique physiology and focus on restoring function, not just ruling out diagnosis. Many of our patients have felt dismissed elsewhere, but found real answers when we took the time to investigate root causes.

If you're ready to understand what's really happening and create a personalized plan, we'd love to support you.

[BOOKING_LINK]

Warmly,
The Peninsula Integrative Medicine Team

emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps coming back
emails.preview: The missing piece in your care
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Think of your body like a garden. When weeds keep growing back, you can keep pulling them—or you can address the soil conditions that allow them to thrive in the first place.

That's often what's happening with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM]. Standard care typically focuses on managing the symptom itself—the weed. But at Peninsula Integrative, we look at the soil: your hormone balance, digestive function, nutrient status, stress response, and inflammatory triggers.

When [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] persists despite treatment, it usually means there's an underlying imbalance that hasn't been identified yet. Your assessment suggested [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT], which is exactly the kind of root factor that conventional approaches often miss.

Our approach combines the best of conventional medicine, naturopathic care, and evidence-based natural therapies to address the whole picture—not just suppress symptoms.

When you're ready to explore what's really driving your symptoms, we're here.

[BOOKING_LINK]

In health,
Peninsula Integrative Medicine

emails.subject: A patient story you might relate to
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

We recently worked with a patient—we'll call her Sarah—who came to us experiencing [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], just like you. She'd been to multiple doctors, tried various medications, and still felt stuck.

During her first visit, we discovered that her symptoms weren't random. Through comprehensive testing and careful evaluation, we identified imbalances in [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] that had been completely overlooked.

Within weeks of addressing these root causes with a personalized protocol, Sarah noticed real shifts. Her energy improved, her symptoms became less frequent, and she finally felt heard and supported.

Of course, every person's situation is unique, and results vary based on individual circumstances. But Sarah's story illustrates what becomes possible when we take the time to investigate what's really going on.

If you're ready to stop managing symptoms and start addressing root causes, let's create your personalized plan.

[BOOKING_LINK]

We're here when you're ready,
Dr. Kemnec and the Peninsula Integrative Team

Hormone Imbalance: Unexplained weight gain or difficulty losing weight
Fertility Challenges: Difficulty conceiving after 6+ months of trying
Low ovarian reserve or AMH levels
Digestive Issues: Skin issues related to gut health
Chronic Fatigue: Exhaustion that doesn't improve with rest
Waking up tired despite full night sleep
Complex Illness: Chronic Lyme disease or tick-borne illness
